text_excerpt: News - Will Forster MP Skip to main content Will Forster MP About Will Contact Will Will's Campaigns Volunteer News Woking Lib Dems Donate Join Donate Join Will's Campaigns Hilton & Sir Robert McAlpine International Affairs Housing & Welfare Vulnerable Children Council Finance Cost of living Healthcare, Social Care & the NHS Trains News Article News Will Forster MP Delivers Parliament petition demanding action on dangerous Old Woking High Street Will Forster, the Liberal Democrat MP for Woking, has formally delivered a Petition to Parliament calling on the Government to take urgent action to make Old Woking High Street safer. PR by Press Release 15 Apr 2026 View Healthcare Will Forster announces new Neighbourhood Health Centre for Woking Will Forster, Liberal Democrat MP for Woking, has announced Government funding to create a Neighbourhood Health Centre in Woking. 30 Mar 2026 View Housing & Welfare Tackling homelessness in Woking and beyond I recently spoke in Parliament about the growing crisis of homelessness, highlighting the incredible work of the York Road Project in Woking. I also raised serious concerns about decisions here in Surrey concerning withdrawing of funds for the homeless. 25 Mar 2026 View Will Forster Canvassing with Josh Babarinde Out in Woking with Josh Babarinde, speaking directly with residents about the issues shaping my work in Parliament and our community. 25 Mar 2026 View Vulnerable Children Woking MP demands extension of Surrey free school meal voucher scheme Woking MP Will Forster has demanded Surrey County Council reconsider its decision to end the free school meal holiday voucher scheme, warning that vulnerable children could lose an important safety net. 20 Mar 2026 View Will Forster Fighting for facilities in West Byfleet I’ve recently been campaigning on key issues in eastern Woking, including pharmacy provision and securing adequate banking after Lloyds announced its branch closure. 12 Mar 2026 View 1 2 3 4 5 … 19 Sign up for email updates Get the latest news from Will Forster MP and the local Lib Dem team Oops!
